Genova_Saddle

MJY

2024-07-15

OUTLINES:

1. Use GENOVA to generate Aggregate TAD Analysis (ATA) plots to quantify the enrichment of chromatin contacts around TAD boundaries and assess domain insulation.

#’ ##
#’ 1. Use GENOVA to generate Aggregate TAD Analysis (ATA) plots to quantify the enrichment of chromatin contacts around TAD boundaries and assess domain insulation.

library(GENOVA)
library(ggplot2)
## 
## Attaching package: 'ggplot2'
## The following object is masked from 'package:GENOVA':
## 
##     resolution
library(patchwork)


# 6w
con_6w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/con_6w/iced/40000/con_6w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path= '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/con_6w/raw/40000/con_6w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
ccl4_6w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/ccl4_6w/iced/40000/ccl4_6w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/ccl4_6w/raw/40000/ccl4_6w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
con_6w_TAD <- read.table("/public/home/mjy/HCC/TAD_gene/bed/con_6w_merged.TAD.bed")
ccl4_6w_TAD <- read.table("/public/home/mjy/HCC/TAD_gene/bed/ccl4_6w_merged.TAD.bed")

ATA_6w <- ATA(list("con_6w" = con_6w,
                   'ccl4_6w' = ccl4_6w),
              bed = con_6w_TAD)

P_6 <- visualise(ATA_6w,
          colour_lim = c(0,500),
          colour_lim_contrast = c(-150,150),
          metric = "diff",
          focus = 1) # which entry to use as comparison

P_6

# ggsave(filename = "/public/home/mjy/HCC/TAD/Fib_vs_con_6.png",
#        plot = P_6, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 1000)


# 10w
con_10w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/con_10w/iced/40000/con_10w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path= '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/con_10w/raw/40000/con_10w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
ccl4_10w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/ccl4_10w/iced/40000/ccl4_10w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/ccl4_10w/raw/40000/ccl4_10w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
con_10w_TAD <- read.table("/public/home/mjy/HCC/TAD_gene/bed/con_10w_merged.TAD.bed")
ccl4_10w_TAD <- read.table("/public/home/mjy/HCC/TAD_gene/bed/ccl4_10w_merged.TAD.bed")

ATA_10w <- ATA(list("con_10w" = con_10w,
                   'ccl4_10w' = ccl4_10w),
              bed = con_10w_TAD)

P_10 <- visualise(ATA_10w,
          colour_lim = c(0,500),
          colour_lim_contrast = c(-150,150),
          metric = "diff",
          focus = 1) # which entry to use as comparison

P_10

# ggsave(filename = "/public/home/mjy/HCC/TAD/Cir_vs_con_10.png",
#        plot = P_10, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 1000)


 
# 18w
con_18w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/con_18w/iced/40000/con_18w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path= '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/con_18w/raw/40000/con_18w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
ccl4_18w <- load_contacts(
  signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/ccl4_18w/iced/40000/ccl4_18w_40000_iced.matrix',
  indices_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/martix/ccl4_18w/raw/40000/ccl4_18w_40000_abs.bed')
## Reading data...
con_18w_TAD <- read.table("/public/home/mjy/HCC/TAD_gene/bed/con_18w_merged.TAD.bed")
ccl4_18w_TAD <- read.table("/public/home/mjy/HCC/TAD_gene/bed/ccl4_18w_merged.TAD.bed")

ATA_18w <- ATA(list("con_18w" = con_18w,
                   'ccl4_18w' = ccl4_18w),
              bed = con_18w_TAD)

P_18 <- visualise(ATA_18w,
          colour_lim = c(0,500),
          colour_lim_contrast = c(-150,150),
          metric = "diff",
          focus = 1) # which entry to use as comparison

P_18
